rewritten_requirements: The system shall display a Google map view on the main screen.
The system shall provide multiple routes to reach a destination from a source, including traffic and pollution status updates.
The system shall allow users to blow a horn to all users within a specified radius.
The system shall send notifications to users within a specified radius when a user blows their horn.
The system shall allow users to report accidents to the concerned authorities.
The system shall categorize areas prone to accidents based on the number of accidents that have occurred there.
The system shall provide information about hotels and restaurants available along a chosen route.
The system shall send an SMS to the caller when a driver is traveling beyond a specified speed limit.
The system shall allow users to enable drive mode before starting their journey.
The system shall allow users to provide feedback on the accuracy of traffic and pollution levels in a specific area.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Display Google map view on the main screen
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This app consists of a Google map view on the main screen.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Provide multiple routes to reach destination from source with traffic and pollution status updates
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A user can select the source to destination path which then will be processed to give a number of routes to reach the destination from source with amount of traffic at various locations in that path along with current pollution status in that route (which updates overtime).

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow users to blow horn to all users within a specific radius
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If there exists a traffic jam, a user can blow a horn to all users within a specific radius.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Send notifications to users in specified radius when user blows horn
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: According to his current location in the form of a small notification which the persons in the specified radius will receive.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow users to report accidents to concerned authority
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The accidents that occurred at specific spots will be reported by the user to the concerned authority who will do the rescue operations

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Categorize accident-prone areas based on number of accidents
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: and a notification appears for the user to drive slow and safe when they are in that particular location.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Provide information about hotels and restaurants along chosen route
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Meals- on- wheel provides information about hotels and restaurants which are available in the chosen route so that the user can place the order as per the available menu at a particular eating place including time of service

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Send SMS to caller when driver is driving beyond speed limit
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This module would send an SMS to the caller that the particular person is driving when the geo- coordinates show the mobile shifting of the driver is beyond some specified speed limit (say, 20 kmph)

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow users to turn on drive-mode before start of journey
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Before start of the journey, this module can be turned on.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow users to give feedback about traffic and pollution levels in given area
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The feedback feature allows the user to give feedbacks about the accuracy in the traffic and pollution levels in a given area
